jtc.status_disabled: Join to create is currently not enabled.
jtc.status_enabled: Join to create is enabled. Lobby: {lobby}. Category: {category}.
jtc.setup_success: Join to create enabled. Lobby: {lobby}. Category: {category}.
jtc.disabled: Join to create has been disabled.
logs.status_disabled: Audit logging is currently not enabled.
logs.status_enabled: Audit logging is enabled. Stored entries: {count}.
logs.setup_success: Audit logging was enabled. New events will now be stored in the database for the future web panel.
antispam.status_enabled: Anti-spam is enabled. Limit: {threshold} messages in {interval} seconds. Action: `{action}`.
antispam.setup_success: Anti-spam enabled. Limit: {threshold} messages in {interval} seconds. Action: `{action}`.
reaction_roles.status_empty: There are currently no reaction-role panels on this server.
reaction_roles.panel_field_value_empty: No roles added yet. Use `/reactionroles add`.
reaction_roles.panel_missing: This reaction-role panel could not be found.
reaction_roles.entry_not_found: No entry for this role was found in that panel.
reaction_roles.entry_exists: This role is already present in the panel.
reaction_roles.entry_missing: This role button is no longer valid.
reaction_roles.too_many_entries: This panel already has the maximum number of role buttons.
reaction_roles.role_missing: The stored role could not be found.
reaction_roles.role_too_high: This role is higher than or equal to the bot role.
reaction_roles.manage_footer: Use the buttons below to add or remove roles without extra commands.
reaction_roles.manage_add_prompt: Choose the role you want to add to this panel now.
reaction_roles.manage_remove_prompt: Choose the entry you want to remove from this panel now.
reaction_roles.manage_remove_empty: This panel currently has no roles to remove.
verification.panel_description: Please confirm here that you should receive access to the server.
verification.panel_field_value: Click the button below. You will automatically receive the configured role.
verification.setup_success: Verification panel created in {channel}. Role granted on success: {role}.
verification.not_configured: Verification is not fully configured yet.
verification.member_required: You must be recognized as a guild member to verify.
verification.role_missing: The configured verification role could not be found.
verification.success: Verification successful. You now have the role {role}.
tickets.panel_field_value: Click the button below to create a ticket.
tickets.panel_category_field_value: This panel contains multiple ticket categories. After clicking the button, users will first choose the matching category.
tickets.panel_topic_field_value: Before opening a ticket, users can first choose a matching topic like bug, finance, or application.
tickets.panel_limit_reached: You reached the ticket panel limit. Your current limit is {limit}.
tickets.panels_reset_done: Ticket panels reset. Removed DB entries: {removed}, deleted messages: {deleted}, stale entries: {stale}.
tickets.panel_missing: This ticket panel is no longer valid.
tickets.category_prompt: Please choose the matching ticket category first.
tickets.category_not_found: The selected ticket category could not be found.
tickets.topic_prompt: Please choose the matching ticket topic first.
tickets.topic_not_found: The selected ticket topic is no longer valid.
tickets.already_open: You already have {limit} open tickets. Please close one before creating a new one.
tickets.created_channel_message: {user}, welcome to your ticket. A team member will help you soon.
tickets.not_found: No open ticket was found for this channel.
setup.check_ok: Rysio currently has all important core permissions.
setup.check_missing: Rysio is still missing important permissions: {permissions}
rysio.join_description: Rysio is now on your server. Next, run `/rysio setup` and choose a channel for info, help, and updates.
rysio.welcome_description: Thanks for using Rysio. Here you get the fastest entry point, the core features, and direct contact with the creator.
rysio.help_field_value: Start with `/rysio help`. That overview contains all current commands, modules, and next options in one place.
rysio.features_field_value: Tickets, verification, autoroles, anti-spam, notifications, moderation, and the first web panel are already part of Rysio.
rysio.contact_field_value: Questions, feedback, or issues? You can reach out to {creator} directly.
rysio.website_field_value: You can find more about Rysio, updates, and the panel on `rysio.app`.
rysio.setup_success: Rysio has been configured. The info channel is now {channel}.
rysio.no_info_channel: No info channel has been set yet. Use `/rysio setup` first.
rysio.info_channel_missing: The saved info channel could not be found. Run `/rysio setup` again.
rysio.info_channel_not_writable: Rysio currently cannot write or send embeds in the saved info channel.
rysio.commands_posted: The command overview was posted again in {channel}.
rysio.help_description: Here are the main commands and entry points for your server.
rysio.help_footer: Rysio is built modularly and will continue to expand.
rysio.join_field_value:
1. Run `/rysio setup`
2. Choose an info channel
3. Check `/rysio status`
4. Enable features one by one
rysio.status_description: Here you can see what is already configured on this server and what is still open.
rysio.status_footer: Open means setup is still missing. Done means the feature is already prepared.
patch_notes.title: Rysio Update {version}
patch_notes.footer: These patch notes are only posted automatically once per version.
owner.status:
Owner bypass: `{bypass}`
Current premium plan on this server: `{premium}`
owner.premium_updated: Premium test plan for this server was set to `{plan}`.
owner.panel_posted: Owner control panel was posted in {channel}.
owner.panel_description: Manage your owner bypass and the premium test state for this server here.
owner.panel_actions_value: Use the buttons below to toggle bypass or set a premium test plan.
